name: Sinopower Semiconductor, Inc.
summary: Sinopower Semiconductor, Inc. operates as a fabless IC design company in Taiwan. The company designs, markets, and sells power discrete devices, including MOSFET and IGBT; and high voltage power ICs. The company's products are used in various applications, such as computers comprising PCs and servers, as well as power suppliers, communication equipment, handheld devices, consumer products, industrials, etc. Sinopower Semiconductor, Inc. was founded in 2008 and is headquartered in Hsinchu, Taiwan.
